daily.today_energy: Your vibe is all about curiosity meeting clarity. The universe is whispering that it's time to trust your gut instincts—they're basically your spiritual GPS right now, and they're pointing you toward something real.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, there's magic in genuine conversation today. If someone's been on your mind, the energy says it's worth exploring. No games, just authentic connection vibes.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different today—seriously. Channel that mental energy into something concrete. This is peak energy for pitching, creating, or just leveling up your approach to what you're working on.
daily.health: Your body's asking for balance, not extremes. Think nourishing rituals rather than intensity. A good walk, some water, maybe journaling—the simple stuff that actually makes you feel like yourself again.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing its thing this week, Gemini. Your mind is sharper than usual, but don't forget to actually listen instead of just waiting to talk. There's magic in the pauses.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, someone's noticing your energy. If you're in something, vulnerability hits different right now. Single? Stop overthinking and let yourself be a little messy.
weekly.career: Your ideas are genuinely good this week—the kind that make people go 'wait, actually.' Channel that into projects that matter to you. Collaboration flows better than going solo.
weekly.health: Your nervous system's been working overtime. Lean into grounding stuff: walks, tea, touch grass literally. Your body's asking you to slow down and you should probably listen.
